repomixContext.note: Used as local analysis context only. It is intentionally gitignored and must not be staged.

features.name: Center-tab workspace shell with collapsible right library rail
docSearchTerms: MAKE / EDIT / MIX / TRAIN / LEARN / DJ / VJ

features.name: In-app docs modal with raw Markdown download, print/PDF, anchors, and RAG source copy
AI Assistant orb with provider/model selection, key pools, attachments, voice input, and streaming chat
Advanced generation controls with templates, saved prompts, prompt enhancer, output settings, and spectrogram viewer
Chimera multi-clip fusion stack with BPM alignment, base clip, noise weights, and weave scheduling
Browser microphone recorder that can send recordings to editor, init, inpaint, or library
Advanced effects chain with categorized FFmpeg processors, column resizing, waveform previews, and source/output stats
Disk-backed backend library provider with range-streamed audio and mutable metadata
Library bundle downloads and lineage graph exports including metadata, stems, MIDI, and relations
Stem separation sidecar with install/start/stop/status/progress/abort and persisted stem rows
Audio-to-MIDI conversion with installable engines, persisted MIDI rows, and editor send targets
Settings modal for feature toggles, module enablement, restart, and shutdown controls
Waveform editor paintbrush inpainting workflow with crop-aware mask submission and accept/discard review
Step sequencer Standard MIDI export plus single-track/multi-track render-to-editor flows
evidence: Download this pattern as a Standard MIDI File

features.name: Piano roll MIDI import/export, render-to-editor, and linked clip re-editing

features.name: VJ tab and mobile share link for iframe/tunnel-backed performance access
Backend module loader with module manifests and runtime enable/disable settings
Suno cloud generation (Aurora Cloud Console) with simple/custom/cover/mashup, server-side key, and library lineage
Magenta RealTime 2 generation (text/notes/audio-style) via the WSL2 NVIDIA sidecar, the first non-Mac MRT2 port
Edit Tool Stack: six /api/edit/* processor families (mastering, restoration, enhance, delivery, creative-fx, creative-neural) plus AI analyzer
Catalogue cross-provider library gallery with provider badges, inspector spectrograms, and lineage
Controller Vision: detect/identify a MIDI controller from a photo (OpenCV + vision-LLM) with LAN phone pairing
YouTube import: fetch audio from a URL into the Library as a first-class, lineage-tracked entry
EDIT real-time psychoacoustic insert-FX rack on the master bus and per track, baked into COMMIT EDIT
EDIT HRTF spatializer with 12 motion modes including onset-driven Teleport and the live Autopilot choreographer
Metamorph granular identity-bleed morph: rebuild a host sound out of a donor sound, live and to a clip
evidence: Send to editor renders one pass

features.name: Live MIDI timeline playback through the SpessaSynth soundfont engine with a GM and synth-voice instrument picker
Stems and MIDI as first-class library rows: play, favorite, delete, and route, in their own sub-tabs
Quest / XR integrations: delinQuest video, queststitch passthrough, two-way Quest MIDI bridge, hand-tracked control of theDAW, and Quest colocation, without Quest Link or MQDH
evidence: scrcpy relay over ADB (no Quest Link / no MQDH)
GantasmoStitchStreamer MediaCodec H.264 -> TCP -> WS bridge
questmidi module republishes two-way Quest MIDI on the global MIDI bus
hand-tracked MIDI surface + microgestures, MIDI-learnable across DJ/VJ/MAKE/EDIT

features.name: VJ dedicated sources: delinQuest, STITCH passthrough, procedural cymatics, and screen/window capture, alongside webcam/phone/Quest-browser inputs
